AGX.dlg.title: AGX — Credit Transfer
AGX.dlg.hint: Deposit moves credits from your sheet to your AGX balance. Withdraw pulls them back. Whole credits only.
AGX.msg.withdrew: Withdrew {amount} from AGX account '{callsign}' to your sheet.
AGX.err.notLinked: Set your AGX callsign and access code in the module settings first.
AGX.err.noAccount: No AGX account found for callsign '{callsign}'. Create it on the website first.
AGX.err.badCode: AGX access code does not match that callsign.
AGX.err.amount: Enter a whole credit amount greater than zero.
AGX.err.sheetFunds: Not enough credits on the character sheet.
AGX.err.agxFunds: Not enough credits in the AGX balance.
AGX.err.noInventory: No credstick found on that character. Add a credstick item to their inventory first.
AGX.set.callsign.name: AGX Callsign
AGX.set.callsign.hint: Your operative callsign on the Algalterian Galactic Exchange website.
AGX.set.accessCode.name: AGX Access Code
AGX.set.accessCode.hint: Your AGX access code (passphrase). Used to verify the account before any transfer.
AGX.set.url.name: Supabase URL
AGX.set.url.hint: Base URL of the AGX Supabase project. Leave the default unless your GM is self-hosting.
AGX.set.key.name: Supabase Anon Key
AGX.set.key.hint: Public anon key for the AGX Supabase project. Leave the default unless your GM is self-hosting.
